prose: The method used was DFT with the B3LYP functional and def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard') in the gas phase. The calculation was performed on the provided XYZ file for TEMPO (29 atoms). The HOMO-LUMO gap computed is approximately 3.87242 eV. The SCF converged in 12 cycles. Warnings indicate that the energy is finite and the SCF converged successfully.
